global.description: The ad features a dark background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 late-night deal with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo featuring the word 'BiteRush' in a prominent font, set against a dark background.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching letters, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: A large, bold headline stating '2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Reward percentage
elements.description: A bold text displaying '-30%' in a striking font, indicating a discount, positioned above the CTA.

elements.label: Image placeholders
elements.description: Two rectangular placeholders for images, designed to represent user-generated content, with a simple outline.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, placed in the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalistic with bold text, 2-for-1 offer, claim reward.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the sale badge, the headline in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: BiteRush, SALE, UGC, 2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available, -30%, Claim reward
